resources.string: Tap to start or stop Aurora
This action cannot be undone. The preset will be removed permanently.
This will permanently delete every preset and cannot be undone.
This mode disables all throttling and may cause system instability or freezes with screen capture animations.
RAGNAROK sends LED commands as fast as possible and can overwhelm your device. Use only if you understand the risks.
This app is currently in beta and may cause crashes or unstable behavior.
This app is provided for free and you should not be charged for obtaining it. It is available for free on this GitHub repo: exemplegithubrepo
Do you want to save the current values to the selected preset before closing?
Animations now switch automatically based on the foreground app.
In this mode, swiping presets will not change the running animation. Assign apps to presets in settings to control what plays automatically.
